stones.name: Abnormal Status Damage Boost
stones.desc: Increases damage to targets with an Abnormal Status by 1%.

stones.name: Abnormal Status Damage Boost
stones.desc: Increases damage to targets with an Abnormal Status by 4%.

stones.name: Sol Janus
stones.desc: Draws the power of Sol Erda's origin in two forms.

stones.name: Sol Hecate
stones.desc: Coalesce Sol Erda drawn to the Adversary's determination into a guardian spirit.

stones.name: Sol Janus
stones.desc: Draws the power of Sol Erda's origin in two forms.

stones.name: Fruits of Mastery
stones.desc: Increases EXP by 30% for 30 seconds for every 250 Combo Kills

stones.name: Fragment of Distorted Time
stones.desc: 0.5% chance to reduce the skill's remaining cooldown time by 20% upon attacking

stones.name: SHINE Ray/SHINE Antares
stones.desc: [SHINE Ray]: Weaves starlight with the power of the Guide of the Stars and records Ray on the Stellagram.\n[SHINE Antares]: Complete the Antares fusion to summon a rabbit hole.

stones.name: SHINE Boom/SHINE Algol/SHINE Formalhaut
stones.desc:
[SHINE Boom]: Explodes with starlight that records Boom on the Stellagram.
[SHINE Algol]: Complete the Algol fusion to summon Algol as a lizard.
The lizard #ctracks and charges towards nearby enemies within a set area#.
The lizard targets bosses with high Max HP first and is unaffected by attack reflection.
[SHINE Fomalhaut]: Complete the Fomalhaut fusion to summon Fomalhaut as a horned conch for a set duration.
The conch #cspins around you and damages nearby enemies#. 4 will be summoned if the buff is active.
The conches are unaffected by attack reflection.

stones.name: Celestial Design
stones.desc: Summons the primordial starlight of the universe's birth, which bursts out in an explosion.

stones.name: Starlit Cosmos
stones.desc: Draw upon the light of blooming star flowers to awaken a newborn star.

stones.name: Abnormal Status Damage Boost
stones.desc: Increases damage to targets with an Abnormal Status by 1%.

stones.name: Abnormal Status Damage Boost
stones.desc: Increases damage to targets with an Abnormal Status by 1%.

stones.name: Abnormal Status Damage Boost
stones.desc: Increases damage to targets with an Abnormal Status by 4%.

stones.name: Sol Janus
stones.desc: Draws the power of Sol Erda's origin in two forms.

stones.name: Eternal Light
stones.desc:
[Passive Trigger Conditions] Additionally activates Eternal Light when using Spear of Lugh.\r\n
[Eternal Light] Manifests the blinding light of eternity to deal damage to enemies within an area. Has a reactivation cooldown.\r\n
[Radiant Sentinel] Eternal Light summons 1 Radiant Sentinel for a period of time when activated. The Radiant Sentinel finds and deals damage to the nearest enemy in range. If there is a boss within range, the sentinel will prioritize that boss.

stones.name: Sentinel Rise
stones.desc: Rallies the Shining Sentinels to fight against the darkness. Shining Sentinel summoned with this skill persist for a short period of time and disappear once their attack ends.

stones.name: Sentinel Rise
stones.desc: Rallies the Shining Sentinels to fight against the darkness. Shining Sentinel summoned with this skill persist for a short period of time and disappear once their attack ends.

stones.name: Eternal Guardian
stones.desc: Summons the Sentinel Captain, materialized from divine power, and marks enemies with your Guardian's Gaze. Landing Roan attack skills a certain number of times while Guardian's Gaze is active will trigger Judgment of Light, which attacks the enemies marked by Guardian's Gaze.\nAttacks the boss with the highest Max HP first, and is unaffected by attack reflection.

stones.name: Eternal Guardian
stones.desc: Summons the Sentinel Captain, materialized from divine power, and marks enemies with your Guardian's Gaze. Landing Roan attack skills a certain number of times while Guardian's Gaze is active will trigger Judgment of Light, which attacks the enemies marked by Guardian's Gaze.\nAttacks the boss with the highest Max HP first, and is unaffected by attack reflection.

stones.name: Destruction of Roan
stones.desc: Releases an explosive flash that destroys darkness, dealing continuous damage to enemies in a wide range. While casting, you are immune to knockback and debilitating status conditions. Unaffected by attack reflection.

stones.name: Destruction of Roan
stones.desc: Releases an explosive flash that destroys darkness, dealing continuous damage to enemies in a wide range. While casting, you are immune to knockback and debilitating status conditions. Unaffected by attack reflection.

stones.desc: Coalesce Sol Erda drawn to the Adversary's determination into a guardian spirit.

stones.desc: Draws the power of Sol Erda's origin in two forms.

stones.name: Fragment of Distorted Time
stones.desc: 0.5% chance to reduce the skill's remaining cooldown time by 20% upon attacking

stones.name: SHINE Spear of Lugh
stones.desc: Enhances Spear of Lugh.\nSummons the Sentinel Captain after using Spear of Lugh certain number of times, dealing additional attacks.

stones.name: SHINE Fury of Roan/SHINE Sting of Roan
stones.desc:
[SHINE Fury of Roan]: Sweep Roan's spear, which is strengthened by rage, to deal damage to enemies in front of you.
Can be used without casting while attacking with Spear of Lugh.

Not affected by cooldown reset effects.
[SHINE Sting of Roan]: Strike true with Roan's spear and deal damage to enemies in front of you.
Can be used without casting while attacking with Spear of Lugh.

Not affected by cooldown reset effects.

stones.name: Fall of Melin
stones.desc:
Slashes with the legendary Spear of Light that left a scar of darkness, dealing continuous damage to enemies in a large area. Then it immediately deals a final blow, dealing additional continuous damage to enemies in a large area.
#cLv. 10 - Ignore Defense: +20%
Lv. 20 - Boss Damage: +20%
Lv. 30 - Ignore Defense: +30%, Boss Damage: +30%#

stones.name: Radiant Spear
stones.desc:
Launches you high into the air, hurling a giant spear of condensed light to pierce enemies.

#cLv. 10 - Ignore Defense: +10%, Boss Damage: +10%
Lv. 20 - Ignore Defense: +10%, Boss Damage: +10%
Lv. 30 - Ignore Defense: +20%#
